name: Beef and Bean Tortilla Roll-up
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 3 minutes. Add beef; sauté, stirring to break up clumps until no longer red, about 3 minutes. Stir in beans with liquid and 1/2 cup salsa; season with salt and pepper. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes.
2. Place tortillas on a plate; cover with damp paper towel. Microwave on high power for 45 seconds or until warm; this makes the tortillas pliable for rolling. Spread heaping 1/3 cup filling evenly down the center of each tortilla; sprinkle with cheese. Carefully roll up tortillas, seam side down, in a serving dish. Spoon remaining salsa over top.
3. Microwave on high (100%) for 45 seconds. Turn dish; microwave for another 45 seconds.
Variations:
1. Shred cooked chicken or turkey; mix with shredded cheese and a little undiluted condensed mushroom soup. Wrap filling in tortillas and place in baking dish. Dilute remaining soup slightly with water and pour over tortillas; bake.
2. Combine chopped cooked veggies and leftover rice. Stir in salsa, fill, and heat through.
3. Spoon chili down the center of the tortilla. Top with shredded mozzarella cheese; heat.
